title: Wordless Wednesday: Blooms
excerpt: The Husband and I spent Easter Sunday at his grandparents’ house in New Jersey. This really lovely bush/tree/something-or-other outside their home was in full bloom. It had the prettiest pink flowers ever, so I had to take a few shots of it!
content:
The Husband and I spent Easter Sunday at his grandparents’ house in New Jersey. This really lovely bush/tree/something-or-other outside their home was in full bloom. It had the prettiest pink flowers ever, so I had to take a few shots of it!

Isn’t it lovely!? I don’t know what kind it is, but it sure was pretty.

Which photo is your favorite? Any idea what this mystery flowering bush is?
